content_gaps: The actual craft/technique of setting stones (bezel, prong, flush) is almost entirely missing. Most pages are just lists of stones that look good with silver.
There is very little information on how the properties of sterling silver (its softness, coolness, and tendency to tarnish) affect the choice of gemstone and setting style.
Detailed care instructions that address both the metal and specific types of gemstones (e.g., porous stones like turquoise vs. hard stones like sapphire) are absent. Most care advice is generic.
The 'meaning' content is very shallow, often just a bulleted list of birthstones or spiritual properties without connecting it back to the craft or the combined meaning of the stone *with* silver.
Discussion of different silver finishes (polished, matte, oxidized) and how they interact with various gemstones is not covered in any depth.
